reason: Keep the current senses separate. A real-world catastrophic event is not the dramatic genre of a serious play with a sad ending.
semantic_distinction: sem_7c849edf4ec40cc136607c2e: Definition "very sad event"; evidence "It's a tragedy that she died so young.". sem_53e639095183a99335272c63: Definition "serious sad play"; evidence "Shakespeare’s tragedies". Material distinction: A real-world catastrophic event is not the dramatic genre of a serious play with a sad ending.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. Exact or accurate manner modifies how an action is done, whereas the discourse use emphasizes or confirms agreement.
semantic_distinction: sem_c9d5dc63d33d2add7912b2ee: Definition "exactly/accurately"; evidence "They look precisely the same to me.". sem_0c1919b3e0a80c40cdecebb5: Definition "used for emphasis/agreement"; evidence "‘It's not that easy, is it?’ ‘No, precisely.’". Material distinction: Exact or accurate manner modifies how an action is done, whereas the discourse use emphasizes or confirms agreement.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. A projected future situation is a planning possibility, whereas a film or play scenario is an authored plot outline.
semantic_distinction: sem_02c07606dc4abb3d2d5e4fee: Definition "possible future situation"; evidence "Let me suggest a possible scenario.". sem_09d0ff377ae5694fa18f067d: Definition "film/play outline"; evidence "a film scenario". Material distinction: A projected future situation is a planning possibility, whereas a film or play scenario is an authored plot outline.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. A general crossed-line lattice, a numbered map coordinate system, and a regional power distribution network denote different objects and functions.
semantic_distinction: sem_160f06aef688a3a6164fafc0: Definition "line pattern"; evidence "New York’s grid of streets". sem_8409696d03b7fbbb28cfe857: Definition "map squares"; evidence "The grid reference is C8.". sem_ca23049a29586a9792ec3e60: Definition "power network"; evidence "the national grid (= the electricity supply in a country)". Material distinction: A general crossed-line lattice, a numbered map coordinate system, and a regional power distribution network denote different objects and functions.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. Physical reachability and inclusive usability concern access to a place or facility, whereas cognitive accessibility concerns ease of understanding.
semantic_distinction: sem_a4b307b3f755cd9e6063e131: Definition "easy to reach, enter, or use, including for people with disabilities"; evidence "The remote desert area is accessible only by helicopter.". sem_3de2e2e95cc141d77966911d: Definition "easy to understand"; evidence "Her poetry is always very accessible.". Material distinction: Physical reachability and inclusive usability concern access to a place or facility, whereas cognitive accessibility concerns ease of understanding.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. Official enactment applies a rule, tax, or penalty through authority, whereas forcing a burden makes someone accept or bear an unwanted cost.
semantic_distinction: sem_9a942c44dafdb3e03ac92255: Definition "officially make a rule/tax/punishment apply"; evidence "The UN Security Council imposed sanctions in 1992.". sem_fb5933232f70c9a99530421f: Definition "force sb to accept / deal with sth"; evidence "This system imposes additional costs on employers.". Material distinction: Official enactment applies a rule, tax, or penalty through authority, whereas forcing a burden makes someone accept or bear an unwanted cost.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. Pressure causing injury or deformation, pressure reducing material to particles, and compression of people into a confined space have different results.
semantic_distinction: sem_bba6398d9097be184b6d467f: Definition "damage or injure by pressing very hard"; evidence "The car was completely crushed under the truck.". sem_6008df4e2e1ef7328fb36f84: Definition "break into small pieces or powder by pressing"; evidence "Crush the biscuits finely before adding them to the mixture.". sem_6b37973b770f56b05bc2febe: Definition "push or press into a small space"; evidence "Over twenty prisoners were crushed into a small dark cell.". Material distinction: Pressure causing injury or deformation, pressure reducing material to particles, and compression of people into a confined space have different results.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. A share taken from one whole differs from the comparative ratio relating the sizes or amounts of two groups.
semantic_distinction: sem_85140e0ab8647436e74cf742: Definition "part of a whole"; evidence "Water covers a large proportion of the earth's surface.". sem_38fd8bf70a4401181d9430bd: Definition "size/amount relationship"; evidence "The proportion (ratio) of men to women in the college has changed dramatically over the years.". Material distinction: A share taken from one whole differs from the comparative ratio relating the sizes or amounts of two groups.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. An adjective marking a possible future case, a noun naming the possibility of an event or use, and latent ability for later success have different grammar and reference.
semantic_distinction: sem_2775cc572fedf4c370209f27: Definition "able to develop / happen under the right conditions"; evidence "potential customers/buyers/investors/clients". sem_b5ee20d0651aa3cca7f91181: Definition "the possibility of something happening, developing, or being used"; evidence "the potential for change". sem_1c84e62177cc7ca04af5dc35: Definition "qualities or abilities that can be developed for future success"; evidence "All children should be encouraged to realize their full potential.". Material distinction: An adjective marking a possible future case, a noun naming the possibility of an event or use, and latent ability for later success have different grammar and reference.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. The physical sill at a doorway is a concrete location, whereas an abstract threshold is the level or point at which an effect begins.
semantic_distinction: sem_5524351aa292fd61ae7b47bc: Definition "doorway entrance"; evidence "He stepped across the threshold.". sem_b29ba53857725784af2b1833: Definition "starting level / point"; evidence "He has a low boredom threshold (= he gets bored easily).". Material distinction: The physical sill at a doorway is a concrete location, whereas an abstract threshold is the level or point at which an effect begins.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. The noun names a disagreement, one verb challenges truth or official validity, and the other verb argues strongly over a claim, bill, or ownership.
semantic_distinction: sem_b37a43060b1c0c1189b9cb99: Definition "argument"; evidence "industrial/pay disputes". sem_3037f3ff23ceea78f9658cb7: Definition "question whether something is true or officially valid"; evidence "These figures have been disputed.". sem_cf863c65da15c9d78bfd9603: Definition "argue strongly about something, especially ownership"; evidence "I tried to dispute the bill with the waiter.". Material distinction: The noun names a disagreement, one verb challenges truth or official validity, and the other verb argues strongly over a claim, bill, or ownership.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. Royal headwear, the state authority represented by a monarch, and the office or power of monarchy are separate concrete, institutional, and abstract referents.
semantic_distinction: sem_b9fe861503429e13933a193a: Definition "a ceremonial headpiece worn by a monarch"; evidence "The crown was placed upon the new monarch's head.". sem_00db6aa138ec9f1210422506: Definition "government of a country represented by a king / queen"; evidence "land owned by the Crown". sem_f6c15217c4fe59e7fa943a1f: Definition "position / power of a king / queen"; evidence "She refused the crown.". Material distinction: Royal headwear, the state authority represented by a monarch, and the office or power of monarchy are separate concrete, institutional, and abstract referents.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. Geometric equidistance, adjectival similarity or simultaneity, and a noun denoting an analogous counterpart differ in both relation and grammatical role.
semantic_distinction: sem_d7a2da94788ea6c9cb8d5ee8: Definition "same distance apart"; evidence "parallel lines". sem_0f7b167bb80b4f59dea7fabb: Definition "very similar / happening together"; evidence "parallel trends". sem_431969c49908d5f75a4e70af: Definition "similar thing"; evidence "These ideas have parallels (equivalent) in Freud's thought too.". Material distinction: Geometric equidistance, adjectival similarity or simultaneity, and a noun denoting an analogous counterpart differ in both relation and grammatical role.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. Recognizing or showing a difference is neutral comparison, whereas treating people differently denotes discriminatory conduct.
semantic_distinction: sem_8309177d836b8a44fb585051: Definition "tell / show the difference"; evidence "It's difficult to differentiate (distinguish) between the two varieties.". sem_aa368b4b958fdb4fe892f305: Definition "treat differently, often unfairly"; evidence "Rules that differentiate (discriminate) between employees on the basis of gender need to be revised.". Material distinction: Recognizing or showing a difference is neutral comparison, whereas treating people differently denotes discriminatory conduct.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. Fundamental thorough change, a novel major idea, and a political commitment to sweeping reform describe different properties and affiliations.
semantic_distinction: sem_0b761584f57fc1f1af72b489: Definition "basic and complete"; evidence "the need for radical (far-reaching) changes in education". sem_c06332015d8eab4585dd6526: Definition "new and major"; evidence "radical ideas". sem_608a9152a2cd0cdd35655b3c: Definition "wanting big political change"; evidence "the radical wing of the party". Material distinction: Fundamental thorough change, a novel major idea, and a political commitment to sweeping reform describe different properties and affiliations.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. Gradual regular progression concerns rate over time, whereas uninterrupted steadiness describes sustained gaze or action without wavering.
semantic_distinction: sem_59ac11a7ce1b109ce3fc4275: Definition "gradually and regularly"; evidence "The company's exports have been increasing steadily.". sem_002ebd2c78f3cc15b42f977a: Definition "without changing or being interrupted"; evidence "He looked at her steadily.". Material distinction: Gradual regular progression concerns rate over time, whereas uninterrupted steadiness describes sustained gaze or action without wavering.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. Conceptual non-physical content differs from visual art that deliberately avoids realistic representation.
semantic_distinction: sem_c9a926bec53cc127bf9c1279: Definition "based on ideas, not physical things"; evidence "abstract knowledge/principles". sem_514c6dd903e7d8f635776190: Definition "not showing things realistically"; evidence "abstract art". reason: Keep the current senses separate. Combining ideas into an intellectual whole differs from producing a chemical or biological substance through synthesis.
semantic_distinction: sem_0a9494d8f2d472365670c001: Definition "combination of ideas"; evidence "the synthesis of art with everyday life". sem_77d479c16633ec3423c30aeb: Definition "[specialist]production of a substance"; evidence "protein synthesis". reason: Keep the current senses separate. A figurative duty causing worry or work differs from a concrete heavy load physically carried.
semantic_distinction: sem_1803867b9af7b978664fda62: Definition "duty / responsibility that causes worry / hard work"; evidence "to bear/carry/ease/reduce/share the burden". sem_102c72b93ec5c83651882699: Definition "heavy load that is carried"; evidence "The little donkey struggled under its heavy burden.". Material distinction: A figurative duty causing worry or work differs from a concrete heavy load physically carried.

reason: Keep the current senses separate. Temporal simultaneity, direct contrast equivalent to whereas, and concessive although introduce different logical relations between clauses.
semantic_distinction: sem_5bc79103a8b80b13b066ace3: Definition "while"; evidence "In the UK it is illegal to drive whilst (when) holding a mobile phone.". sem_cd1f3d16e00c7b5318627755: Definition "whereas"; evidence "Whilst my brother is hard-working, I'm quite lazy.". sem_38706299530b30f4edba28cb: Definition "although"; evidence "Whilst the results of this study are certainly interesting, they are far from conclusive.". Material distinction: Temporal simultaneity, direct contrast equivalent to whereas, and concessive although introduce different logical relations between clauses.
